Whether you’re training staff, volunteers, candidates, or anything in between, you’ve probably got a few questions that need some expert advice, and Kelly is ready to help. [**Sounds great, right?! Sorry to email you on a Sunday evening, but this is important. Our mid-month deadline is just hours away, and we're $904 shy of our goal.

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: enough is enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
When it comes to looking out for the interests of ALL Tennessseans, GOP leadership cannot be trusted. That’s why we need to go the extra mile to elect and mobilize Tennessee Democrats. Enough is enough.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
We are now within clear sight of exceeding our mid-March goal. If we can raise another $1,908 by midnight tonight we’ll be there. Can you help us? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
As we continue toward 2022, we don’t want to miss any opportunities to build our party stronger, train candidates, and mobilize Tennessee Democrats. We are constantly making changes and improvements, and that’s only possible because we have been consistently meeting our fundraising goals. Will you donate right now, and help us continue to?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now.

subject: An America-First GOP

| Peter,
Donald Trump has called for America-First Republicans to run for Congress so we can truly see a government that represents the people. Right now, we have leadership that favors globalists and corporate interests instead of standing up for the Silent Majority.
Americans want warriors that fight the fake news media, put America first, and that will fight corrupt corporations that use American ingenuity to develop their products here and then turn around and ship their job to China.
The era of the swamp and war machine is over, and Republicans need to act on it.
[We need to shed all establishment RINOs from the conservative wing of government. Each voter should ask their candidates or elected officials:](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xaVcX97mmmfStMdPec_deeg26m0GASVEq9K9BfCJEX6iytBiRAYcI3MaaYeXjLg8DhoFEbuXbu-q5TuPNMuD3spXMPz1mssN1-5q1FCHOOsaJfCLhwQwqpQ5xOxq4j7_rg46_5sQJkqtLeVX1jjoxunuPGnK1lrEPfjKhukA3ax9POWRhC-DEg_wqKrtu1gk&c=DIL9nyh_7CZb8sUn1ri1_LOgRg549927FA-lfJWggXxNr9M-1uadKw==&ch=HyAw8uWjL8C4u5T4a8jhRjoC_FD3r8jLbNq899Tj_Zl2yBVgYy6bJQ==)
\- Do you support President Trump's America First policies?
\- Are you willing to stand up for the middle class and bring back our jobs from China?
\- Do you believe in free speech or do you support Silicon Valley's unconstitutional quest to censor conservatives?
\- Are you willing to take on the Deep State that is targeting Trump supporters?
\- Do you believe that All Lives Matter - including the unborn - or are you going to cower to Liberal Mob?
If your candidate or elected official says yes to all of these questions, you can trust The Swamp won't consume them once they are in office.
Conservatives like you and me need to vote out every RINO.
[Please, consider donating to my campaign to be your warrior in D.C. I will always put America First, but The Swamp hates me...that is why I need your support.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xaVcX97mmmfStMdPec_deeg26m0GASVEq9K9BfCJEX6iytBiRAYcI3MaaYeXjLg8DhoFEbuXbu-q5TuPNMuD3spXMPz1mssN1-5q1FCHOOsaJfCLhwQwqpQ5xOxq4j7_rg46_5sQJkqtLeVX1jjoxunuPGnK1lrEPfjKhukA3ax9POWRhC-DEg_wqKrtu1gk&c=DIL9nyh_7CZb8sUn1ri1_LOgRg549927FA-lfJWggXxNr9M-1uadKw==&ch=HyAw8uWjL8C4u5T4a8jhRjoC_FD3r8jLbNq899Tj_Zl2yBVgYy6bJQ==)

Democrats just forced through one of the most partisan and reckless bills that we have ever seen
Hey Friend, it's Liz Cheney.

**Democrats just forced through one of the most partisan and reckless bills that we have ever seen.** They are spending nearly $2 trillion taxpayer dollars on their far-left agenda, while just focusing 9% of their bill on COVID health spending. name: Senator Marsha Blackburn
subject: Emergency: Joe Biden hid the TRUTH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Joe Biden completely STOLE credit for all of the hard work and success of President Trump's Operation Warp Speed. He attacked President Trump all while patting himself on the back for "keeping" the promises he made to the American people.

Did you hear what Joe Biden had to say recently? _I couldn 't believe it!_

Joe Biden completely STOLE credit for all of the hard work and success of President Trump's Operation Warp Speed. He attacked President Trump all while patting himself on the back for "keeping" the promises he made to the American people.

But you know what we didn't hear Joe talk about? **OUR BORDER CRISIS****.** I was stunned by Biden's lack of accountability and refusal to acknowledge the total emergency at our southern border.

**[**Hold Biden Accountable**](https://secure.winred.com/btvf/stop-the-radical-left-open-borders/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210315_TY.100609_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051879-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210315_emergency-joe-biden-hid-the-truth/?recurring=true&amount=25)**
---

While Joe Biden was giving himself kudos, he failed to acknowledge the thousands of migrant children stranded at our border all because of his failed policies.

**President Trump warned us this would happen and now America is suffering the consequences.**

I'm committed to fighting back against the failed immigration agenda of the radical Left and I refuse to turn a blind eye to the devastation on our border. [**I 'm hoping you'll join me in my fight! Can I count on your IMMEDIATE emergency support?**](https://secure.winred.com/btvf/stop-the-radical-left-open-borders/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210315_TY.100609_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051879-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210315_emergency-joe-biden-hid-the-truth/?recurring=true&amount=25)

**[**Rush Support**](https://secure.winred.com/btvf/stop-the-radical-left-open-borders/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210315_TY.100609_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051879-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210315_emergency-joe-biden-hid-the-truth/?recurring=true&amount=25)**
---

What's happening at our southern border and to migrant children is an utter travesty, but Joe Biden wants to distract you from these issues! He thinks holding an 8PM news briefing about the vaccine will cause patriots to not hold him accountable for his failures.

[**Well I 'm here to make it known that he's wrong and I know you agree, so please join me in my fight to solve the crisis at our border by rushing emergency support NOW!**](https://secure.winred.com/btvf/stop-the-radical-left-open-borders/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210315_TY.100609_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051879-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210315_emergency-joe-biden-hid-the-truth/?recurring=true&amount=25)

**[**Rush Support**](https://secure.winred.com/btvf/stop-the-radical-left-open-borders/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210315_TY.100609_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051879-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210315_emergency-joe-biden-hid-the-truth/?recurring=true&amount=25)**
---

_Joe Biden caused the crisis at our southern border and it 's up to us to fight back before it's too late. _

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn
U.S. Senator (R-TN)

**[**Rush Support**](https://secure.winred.com/btvf/stop-the-radical-left-open-borders/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210315_TY.100609_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1051879-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210315_emergency-joe-biden-hid-the-truth/?recurring=true&amount=25)**

Friend,

**I need your help right now to keep up with how much the Democrats are spending.**

Last year the Democrats spent millions of dollars to keep me out of Congress... but it didn't work because we had the support of patriots like you.

This time around, though, Nancy Pelosi is ready to drop even more money to buy this district out from under us. **This cannot happen.**

That's why I am reaching out to you right now. My final mid-month fundraising deadline of this quarter is tonight, and I need reinforcements from top grassroots supporters like you if we are going to combat the Democrats. It's critical that I am able to keep up with the Democrats' dark money machine. Districts like mine are crucial to retaking the House Majority for Republicans and putting a stop to the Far Left's socialist agenda.

**If we can 't hit our goal, that means the Democrats have the upper hand, which makes any hopes of retaking the House Majority even smaller.**

But we still have until midnight tonight, and we still have the momentum to keep up with the Far Left. But we need to start right here, right now. clean_body: I need reinforcements from top grassroots supporters like you if we are going to combat the Democrats. ** . == Friend, I need your help right now to keep up with how much the Democrats are spending. Last year the Democrats spent millions of dollars to keep me out of Congress... but it didn't work because we had the support of patriots like you. This time around, though, Nancy Pelosi is ready to drop even more money to buy this district out from under us. This cannot happen. That's why I am reaching out to you right now. My final mid-month fundraising deadline of this quarter is tonight, and I need reinforcements from top grassroots supporters like you if we are going to combat the Democrats. == | | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == It's critical that I am able to keep up with the Democrats' dark money machine. Districts like mine are crucial to retaking the House Majority for Republicans and putting a stop to the Far Left's socialist agenda. If we can 't hit our goal, that means the Democrats have the upper hand, which makes any hopes of retaking the House Majority even smaller. But we still have until midnight tonight, and we still have the momentum to keep up with the Far Left. But we need to start right here, right now. == Thank you, Michelle Steel ==** With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

Together, we have and will continue to make history, shatter the glass ceiling, and pave the way for women and girls for generations.
In honor of Women's History Month, I'm collecting signatures from Patriots across the nation who stand with GOP Women in Congress. I'd love it if you were one of them. My goal is to reach 15,000 by midnight tonight. The Democrats are determined to make sure that Iowa falls behind because, right now, Iowa is doing better than any Democrat-run state. Iowa has the 3rd lowest unemployment rate in the country, a GDP outpacing the rest of America collectively, and is the #1 state in opportunity according to U.S. News and World Report.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: What until you see what I'm doing today...
body:
Guess where Laura Loomer is at Mon 3/15 and what she is about to day about the proposed FL Big-Tech Law and its impacts to her and President Trump. |
---
| |
---
| Dear Patriot,

I just drove six hours from Palm Beach, Florida to the Florida State Capitol in Tallahassee where I’ll be presenting comments to the Appropriations Committee of the Florida Legislature at 3:45pm EST on Governor Ron DeSantis’s Big-Tech censorship bill **HB 7013** , titled “**Technology Transparency”. NOTE: the link to watch the hearing is at the end of this email.**
---
| | [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=818efd6d32&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
It was important for me to be here today to voice my grave concerns _outlined below_ about the growing threat of Big-Tech censorship and Big-Tech election interference, because this is a pressing issue that is affecting millions of Americans, and many Floridians, _including myself and President Donald Trump_ , who is now a resident and voter in Florida’s 21st District where I am running for Congress.
---
| Many of you are aware that my candidacy for US Congress in 2020 was the first de-platformed campaign in US history. We faced immense and unprecedented hurdles to bypass bans on all social media platforms and numerous telecommunication networks to communicate our message directly to the voters during COVID-19, but we paved the way for future de-platformed and censored candidates, one of whom may very well be President Donald Trump, if he decides to run for President again in 2024. This was only possible with the support of people like you and my other loyal supporters, fans, and donors who helped create the playbook.
---
| | [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=d7acda6b79&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
**[HELP](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=7fc71d35bf&e=4d7c0901a7) ****me fight back against Big-Tech censorship and election interference today by donating to my campaign so I can get to Congress and take down the Big-Tech tyrants! **
---
| Recently, the _Wall Street Journal_ published an article about how the battles to protect the country against Big-Tech are taking place in State Capitals. On Fox News during Tucker Carlson’s show, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis touted his proposed legislation that Florida lawmakers are currently crafting to combat Big-Tech censorship and Big-Tech election interference. **If the bill in Florida passes, other states are considering using it as flagship legislation to model their own Big-Tech laws, so this legislation must be effective. **

I’m appearing **today** at the Florida State Capitol to fight for changes to the current bill. Ensuring that Florida adopts reasonable and comprehensive regulations to prevent social media platforms from silencing the voices of candidates running for office is important.

The first draft of the bill is welcomed, **BUT** I have identified _numerous issues with the bill_ that require more fine tuning to eliminate loopholes which Big-Tech will continue to exploit to censor Americans, silence candidates, discriminate against conservatives, and interfere in our elections.

**Currently, the bill wouldn’t provide protection for my campaign from Big-Tech censorship, and it also wouldn’t protect President Trump if he were to run again in 2024.**
---
| The issues in the proposed bill that I have identified and am fighting to fix include the following:
* **_Cover President Trump and Myself_ :** Individuals who were previously de-platformed and banned are NOT covered in the bill should they run for a federal position in Florida as a Florida resident, including US Congress or President. This impacts people like myself, and President Trump. The bill MUST be changed.
* _**Protect Pro-Conservative Social Media Alternatives**_ : Big Tech literally wiped out millions of conservative voices, and thousands of elected officials and candidates on a global scale etc. when Amazon Web Services (AWS) arbitrarily decided to shut down Parler, an alternative social media haven popular among conservatives. While the bill outlines some types of Big Tech components that are being leveraged against conservatives, it fails to include hosting services like Amazon, and this can happen again unless the bill is changed.
* _**Stop App Store Censorship:**_ The bill also fails to address the censorship perpetuated by the Apple and Google App stores, which are notorious for de-platforming conservative apps like Parler and Gab.
* _**Stop Cable Censorship:**_ The bill should also include protection for Floridians and Florida candidates from being censored by Internet companies, phone companies, and communication companies like Xfinity Comcast, which censored my campaign from sending text messages and emails in 2020 while they donated to my Democrat opponent, Lois Frankel.
* _**Stop Financial Transaction Censorship:**_ The bill needs to include protection from de-banking to ensure that Floridians aren’t arbitrarily banned from services like PayPal, Venmo, Cash App, GoFundMe, payment processors, modes of transportation including Uber and Lyft, as well as food delivery services like Uber Eats, etc. all of which I have been banned from using because of my conservative political beliefs, both as an individual, and as a candidate for US Congress.
* _**Fines have no Clarity:**_ Governor Ron DeSantis has stated that under this legislation, Big Tech companies will be fined $100,000 each day that they de-platform political candidates in Florida. However, the fine detail of the bill is that this penalty only applies to what the bill calls “statewide candidates” i.e. Governor, Senators. A minimal fine of only $10,000 would be applied for the censorship of what the bill labels as “other candidates”, without any specifics of whom that includes.
* _**Fines have no Teeth:**_ This penalty is chump change in the eyes of Facebook, Twitter, and Google, and they wouldn't even take it seriously. That’s why I’m proposing the penalty needs to be substantially higher at a rate of $100 million a day, per candidate if they are de-platformed both prior to their campaign, during their campaign, or both. The whole point of punitive damages is to make sure the offense is NEVER repeated again. The laughable fines in the current bill are not severe enough and would not harm Big Tech.
* _**No Protection of Free Speech:**_ The bill provides no blanket protection for all non-violent, constitutionally protected free speech.

---
| Big Tech Social Media companies are watching closely and they are constantly updating their malicious user policies to get away with as much political censorship of conservatives as possible. **As a candidate, I VOW to not be silenced, and I vow to never sit back and allow for Big Tech to silence YOU.**

I will continue exposing Big-Tech and hold State Legislatures accountable for passing good legislation that benefits ALL Americans and candidates.

Help me get to Congress in 2022 where I will continue to expose, and hold Big-Tech accountable, and protect your free speech, and the integrity of our elections!

[**Can I count on you to support my campaign today with a generous donation of $22?**](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=ac7128f541&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
| [ ](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=c0c9b08577&e=4d7c0901a7)
---
| **The public can watch the event live by clicking on the following link and selecting the Appropriations Committee meeting at 3:45 pm EST today, March 15, 2021.**

[https://thefloridachannel.org](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=a59bae54bd&e=4d7c0901a7)

Thank you so much for your support,
---
|
---
| | Laura Loomer
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 www.LauraLoomerForCongress.com, All rights reserved._

Laura Loomer for Congress, Inc.
720 Lucerne Ave #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=ce0d9c9288) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://loomer2022.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d785e260c6b2afb4901a22cab&id=865964df51&e=4d7c0901a7&c=ce0d9c9288).
---

name: Moms for Equality
subject: What do women want?
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
March is Women's History month which means that today and every day, we celebrate women's achievements and also reaffirm our right to economic justice, access to healthcare, and our political voice.
What do women want?
Spoiler alert. Equality. Justice. Opportunity.
We spend a lot of time talking about women who came before us and broke barriers, but today I want to highlight one of our champions who is leading us in this current moment.
Off The Sidelines is Senator Kirsten Gillibrand’s call to action to encourage every woman and girl to make their voice heard on the issues they care about. Raising your voice truly can change the world. Moms in Office is proud to partner with and support Senator Kirsten Gillibrand in our mission to elect more women, especially moms. [https://www.girltalkhq.com/moms-in-office-pac-founder-simona-grace-interviews-sen-kirsten-gillibrand-about-paid-leave-in-america/]
Senator Gillibrand has been at the forefront of this fight for years and one of her goals is to make paid family leave permanent so that all workers could have access to paid leave. I am proud to stand with her and I hope that you will join me [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsoffthesidelines] in support so that we could elect more women to Congress who will vote for these important bills.
The time to act is now.
Peter , I am coming to you personally because I need your help [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsoffthesidelines] . Women around us are leading this fight for equality and the women who will come after us need our support now. Can you chip in $5 today to help me, Moms in Office and Off The Sidelines empower the next generation of changemakers? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsoffthesidelines]
Thank you for your support!
Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsoffthesidelines] $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsoffthesidelines] $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsoffthesidelines] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsoffthesidelines]https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Moms in Office
13351 Riverside Drive
#265
Sherman Oaks, CA 91423
United States

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Urgent Senate Update: Answering the Call
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | | **March 15, 2021** |
---|---|---|---
| | | President Biden has signed the American Rescue Plan into law, and now help is on the way. This historic package [is a win for Maryland](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.capitalgazette.com%2fopinion%2fcolumns%2fac-ce-column-chris-van-hollen-2021307-20210306-7rutbizv2nckxbcy3mxduxp27q-story.html&redir_log=587955956708882) and a win for the American people. It confronts the challenges of this pandemic and the resulting economic fallout head-on and delivers the bold relief that so many Americans need. I worked to secure [federal resources](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-cardin-secure-maryland-funding-in-senate-passed-american-rescue-plan&redir_log=222465215255927) that will help Marylanders overcome these challenging times.

Right now, many of our fellow Marylanders are in need of a lifeline. The American Rescue Plan (ARP) provides just that. It includes $1,400 in direct payments for eligible individuals which, in addition to the earlier $600 payments, brings the total payment to $2,000. Over 2.5 million Maryland households will receive these payments, bringing over $6.25 billion directly into the pockets of Marylanders. This package also expands the Child Tax Credit to $3,000 per child, or $3,600 per child under six years old, and half of this amount will be provided in recurring payments to families in the second half of this year. This provision has the power to lift 52,000 Maryland children out of poverty and benefit a total of more than 1.1 million children in our state. This move - combined with an expansion of the Earned Income Tax Credit, which benefits 255,000 workers without qualifying children - is one of the single most significant actions we could take to reduce poverty. This package also delivers $3.87 billion in direct funding to the State of Maryland, $1.173 billion in direct funding to Maryland's county governments, and $1.14 billion in funding to Maryland's city and municipal governments, totaling $6.355 billion that will help ramp up vaccination distribution, bolster COVID-19 response efforts, and keep frontline workers on the job. This emergency measure also provides resources to get students back to school more quickly and safely, as well as over $7 billion to help end the digital divide for students who lack the ability to connect online with the classroom or do their homework assignments.

We also successfully fought for direct resources for vaccine equity so more vaccines will reach the hardest hit communities, to help remedy the State of Maryland's inadequate and inequitable response. In addition, the ARP includes expanded unemployment benefits through September 6th; child care relief; a doubling of the rental relief provided in the December stimulus; new support for homeowners at risk of foreclosure; additional help to small businesses and the hardest hit sectors, like restaurants; help for thousands of Marylanders to reduce the costs of health insurance; and much more. To learn more about what's included in this new law, please view our fact sheet on the American Rescue Plan by clicking [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fdownload%2fvan-hollen-american-rescue-plan-fact-sheet&redir_log=57315067737589).

This sweeping effort was made possible thanks to the countless Marylanders who reached out to my office throughout this crisis and shared their experiences and struggles. You have been calling for action, and with the American Rescue Plan, we answered your calls. As we push forward to tackle the other urgent challenges before our communities, [I hope to continue hearing from you](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285) so that we can keep marching together towards progress ahead.

Chris Van Hollen

---
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15519.25425009.5128578.7517223)

This emergency measure also provides resources to get students back to school more quickly and safely, as well as over $7 billion to help end the digital divide for students who lack the ability to connect online with the classroom or do their homework assignments. We also successfully fought for direct resources for vaccine equity so more vaccines will reach the hardest hit communities, to help remedy the State of Maryland's inadequate and inequitable response. In addition, the ARP includes expanded unemployment benefits through September 6th; child care relief; a doubling of the rental relief provided in the December stimulus; new support for homeowners at risk of foreclosure; additional help to small businesses and the hardest hit sectors, like restaurants; help for thousands of Marylanders to reduce the costs of health insurance; and much more. To learn more about what's included in this new law, please view our fact sheet on the American Rescue Plan by clicking . This sweeping effort was made possible thanks to the countless Marylanders who reached out to my office throughout this crisis and shared their experiences and struggles. You have been calling for action, and with the American Rescue Plan, we answered your calls. As we push forward to tackle the other urgent challenges before our communities, so that we can keep marching together towards progress ahead. Chris Van Hollen "Facebook" "Twitter" "Instagram" "YouTube" |

name: House GOP
subject: We know how to fix the border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
As THOUSANDS of immigrants are trying to cross our southern border, the Democrats are trying to avoid all blame.

Friend,

As THOUSANDS of immigrants are trying to illegally cross our southern border, the Democrats are trying to avoid all blame. Meanwhile, they're the ones who opened the floodgates at the border THE DAY Biden was inaugurated.

There is no doubt that such a disaster at our southern border WOULD NOT happen under a Trump Presidency and a Conservative House majority. Republicans want to secure our borders to protect Americans from an overburdened government that prioritizes illegal immigrants...like giving them stimulus checks funded with American taxpayer dollars.

[_**Can you help us take back the House to secure our borders and prevent the Democrats from handing over our country to illegal immigrants?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ku2013jtxAF_bRZFhSt2nKoa4h5DuEXFhlR1NvrW33_USDpIjXWhE3f4c-QYT_b-gDR9prQDQOAke_NuTasFMm2Wqb37y9PrvphPZLUuOp1E7huGq09IvmiMvUgoqzcOhQmm3_juQlIAVR91k1jRzIumFDuHyaY5zlykmZvnkoSKWavrCEbzoYqkJKa37pdG6ERlHIx5qJHA_F4Wr23zJRlG0PLtdZ2Sa0ReGOrw7rgR-S96fORq52sshj3tU_jOB_Gpb1fSpZ9LKbsUaZ6KzptLEYZZl6nftDnUd9ASGfgsbZb6HExu7JOaQjYzDCxomYrdc_NqrXllBxErH_PVxNDOVGDE461qQCKG5jL3IvXpW8YeX-vwrVAW7tTu1c737PwO5X5Qn63m9TipUbvR1uz8Qxol4IYN6cXJ0XzLJXe_pLTE5fgBuPngNvKX-x-s&c=3KOkD7c49ChGiWH-Z-ahWI4kKsQ0EGa1FVpLNcygeIkU87i2cReTow==&ch=PoqNaHagTzlCJZp5ZCcm5SOwyCSYuWAQlvQEwzBZQCrcP4DDtmoJsw==)

The Democrats are allowing illegal immigrants to come into our country without going through the proper channels and IT'S JUST PLAIN WRONG. As a Conservative patriot, you know that conservatives and President Trump kept our border more secure than it's been in a long time.

[_**Let us know you stand with us!**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ku2013jtxAF_bRZFhSt2nKoa4h5DuEXFhlR1NvrW33_USDpIjXWhE3f4c-QYT_b-gDR9prQDQOAke_NuTasFMm2Wqb37y9PrvphPZLUuOp1E7huGq09IvmiMvUgoqzcOhQmm3_juQlIAVR91k1jRzIumFDuHyaY5zlykmZvnkoSKWavrCEbzoYqkJKa37pdG6ERlHIx5qJHA_F4Wr23zJRlG0PLtdZ2Sa0ReGOrw7rgR-S96fORq52sshj3tU_jOB_Gpb1fSpZ9LKbsUaZ6KzptLEYZZl6nftDnUd9ASGfgsbZb6HExu7JOaQjYzDCxomYrdc_NqrXllBxErH_PVxNDOVGDE461qQCKG5jL3IvXpW8YeX-vwrVAW7tTu1c737PwO5X5Qn63m9TipUbvR1uz8Qxol4IYN6cXJ0XzLJXe_pLTE5fgBuPngNvKX-x-s&c=3KOkD7c49ChGiWH-Z-ahWI4kKsQ0EGa1FVpLNcygeIkU87i2cReTow==&ch=PoqNaHagTzlCJZp5ZCcm5SOwyCSYuWAQlvQEwzBZQCrcP4DDtmoJsw==)

House Republicans

body:
Republican Esther Joy King is the leader that our state needs.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qAiYdfR4rMXIvKxaiy67FsQE8QYEBpS0H6rGc1Ymeu-OtithRD6Se0mgDAhJojPJMFa1QfUv1fH1IBVCUxnDbSKbxfZGL_cqDHuiZrCX0gB7YDA84eNt9yscyN_67HK6Pb5fgnO0zniE9d_Agusa6nm28_flkFscDtHQCqCZjMLOoYXQbND4XZegbftVC8by1YL3SZYUFny75bEwYiQ6us1KGmVj0WKdvQigVwJmGDZzhWLsGyD90T6luhixuq0KDzdaXgBaKQ_7F-n1_lLnkjD6b_oKbNk4_PoRtX1vounysf7ttFkHg6547XZqo30h-zvhdlf88a7CJcOmqKMv9s9rR9xUV-i7p5QCdvOpLzUpL957GJFTAZb5rz2MdUOLJ5unqH73VlrMKnCIbL5si5ESj7CdfLp8JsSCZwtz07jaxIUq94z2L5ASt6NsDnplZXGSiuh8Ry4=&c=vKuJPqO-Gpg1qc9NyE3hYiOn_Wq6Ls673NXOC-d-s_rDi3JXxIjf6w==&ch=qm9CWYYDlev4ABZn006ZjzYgZLaEMhQEmojmkHUq4cisMkT-ACRp1w==)

It's time for a change in Illinois.
For far too long, Democrat Cheri Bustos put politics above the people of the district she represents.
Cheri ran the Democrats' campaign arm and further divided Americans. She fully supports Pelosi's far left radical agenda to the detriment of her constituents.
[STAND WITH ESTHER JOY KING](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qAiYdfR4rMXIvKxaiy67FsQE8QYEBpS0H6rGc1Ymeu-OtithRD6Se0mgDAhJojPJMFa1QfUv1fH1IBVCUxnDbSKbxfZGL_cqDHuiZrCX0gB7YDA84eNt9yscyN_67HK6Pb5fgnO0zniE9d_Agusa6nm28_flkFscDtHQCqCZjMLOoYXQbND4XZegbftVC8by1YL3SZYUFny75bEwYiQ6us1KGmVj0WKdvQigVwJmGDZzhWLsGyD90T6luhixuq0KDzdaXgBaKQ_7F-n1_lLnkjD6b_oKbNk4_PoRtX1vounysf7ttFkHg6547XZqo30h-zvhdlf88a7CJcOmqKMv9s9rR9xUV-i7p5QCdvOpLzUpL957GJFTAZb5rz2MdUOLJ5unqH73VlrMKnCIbL5si5ESj7CdfLp8JsSCZwtz07jaxIUq94z2L5ASt6NsDnplZXGSiuh8Ry4=&c=vKuJPqO-Gpg1qc9NyE3hYiOn_Wq6Ls673NXOC-d-s_rDi3JXxIjf6w==&ch=qm9CWYYDlev4ABZn006ZjzYgZLaEMhQEmojmkHUq4cisMkT-ACRp1w==)

subject: URGENT: Deadline at 11:59 PM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress

name: Taking the Hill
subject: Join our NCAA Bracket Challenge to support Veterans + Military Families for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

It's that time of year: March Madness! We know many of you are like us, ready to fill out your brackets for the NCAA Men's and Women's Basketball Tournaments this month.

We have a unique opportunity for you this year: [_**come fill out your brackets with us!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8widkZf7CpbkTIyFlKRgqNWy4uSeVfwc92cyenQJjE8=/2KqWUScLHWzw-i-YIARnfrIBMGSp16x8aUlyxH1UEgY=) Purchase as many brackets as you want and see how you stack up against your fellow supporters, veterans, and even some of our friends in Congress! [_**All proceeds will benefit our slate of veterans and military family members of integrity running for Congress**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8widkZf7CpbkTIyFlKRgqNWy4uSeVfwc92cyenQJjE8=/2KqWUScLHWzw-i-YIARnfrIBMGSp16x8aUlyxH1UEgY=) in '21 and '22.

[_**Click here to purchase your brackets!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8widkZf7CpbkTIyFlKRgqNWy4uSeVfwc92cyenQJjE8=/2KqWUScLHWzw-i-YIARnfrIBMGSp16x8aUlyxH1UEgY=) The tournament will be hosted on ESPN, and the winners of our Men's and Women's challenges will get bragging rights as the INAUGURAL Taking the Hill Bracket Challenge Champions!!! You will receive sign-up information once you have [purchased your brackets.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8widkZf7CpbkTIyFlKRgqNWy4uSeVfwc92cyenQJjE8=/2KqWUScLHWzw-i-YIARnfrIBMGSp16x8aUlyxH1UEgY=)

If you don't want to fill out a bracket, but still want to help us elect good candidates to Congress, _**[you can use this link to sign up to be a sponsor of the bracket challenge: PLATINUM, GOLD, SILVER, BRONZE, and MORE!](https://act.myngp.com/el/8widkZf7CpbkTIyFlKRgqNWy4uSeVfwc92cyenQJjE8=/2KqWUScLHWzw-i-YIARnfrIBMGSp16x8aUlyxH1UEgY=)**_

Thanks for helping us "cut down the nets" for veterans and military families in Congress!

Yours in service,

PATRICK + ROGER

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy + Roger Misso
Team _**[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/8widkZf7CpbkTIyFlKRgqNWy4uSeVfwc92cyenQJjE8=/7j6ggjniWY9rd4Gbs3DZ5Njw5DT6RmJQo7cDBScIrhc=)**_

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/8widkZf7CpbkTIyFlKRgqNWy4uSeVfwc92cyenQJjE8=/BNp24dBlSTAwWun2gmRhq3dXbWGXOBuQesHwZCvsVpM=).

| Patriot,
Kat has gotten to work putting Florida and America First since being sworn into the House in January. She has made it her priority to fight for everyday Americans, and she's following through on her promises to protect your Constitutional rights!
Tonight at midnight is our mid-month deadline and this one is critical with the first FEC report of Kat's term coming up.
Let's show that everyday citizens believe in bold, America First leaders more than gun-grabbing, far-left socialists - [pitch in to boost our numbers before the deadline!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zbF80vpOzSFVRoDUX4nJWG4InBTHenezoK15HRieOYw5yfCaU3ofvJnMw4PVD5e58Kzpwiv2fjlM4bJbF3PuBluEN13S_qrb8twRH8fqAa7igFuWmX-s2j8bymv0tz_B2sdfbwnleuNWEYjjGj_oeCHeY19RS2rwQvTQJelGQb5vzPRoDI-8MEpE_v0kzlYi&c=v0b4cRqJRjO7Zz5fFjlc_22EjsfISbxrs3Zf86xmLwe2QA86-WMmJg==&ch=mGhRdC6IsTundNowrLb7z9p6VLx9juBtKv3eQjaXqRriUVSmhIjdUA==)

| Kat has prioritized getting seats on the committees where she can best fight for you. That's why she now proudly serves on the Agriculture Committee and the Homeland Security Committee, where she is the ranking member on the subcommittee on Emergency Preparedness, Response, and Recovery.
But Kat is also working hard to secure blessings of liberty in other ways, like holding "Woke" Big Tech oligarchs accountable for their intrusions on the First Amendment, putting the Chinese Communist Party on notice, and fighting for border security.
Her voting record also shows that she won't back down - Kat has rejected far-left proposals to Defund the Police, undermine the integrity of elections, and infringe upon our gun rights!
Kat is willing to do whatever it takes to ensure your interests are pursued and your values are safeguarded. The first FEC deadline is rapidly approaching, and Kat needs your help to reach this goal. clean_body: Join her in her mission | | | | | | == | Patriot, Kat has gotten to work putting Florida and America First since being sworn into the House in January. She has made it her priority to fight for everyday Americans, and she's following through on her promises to protect your Constitutional rights! Tonight at midnight is our mid-month deadline and this one is critical with the first FEC report of Kat's term coming up. Let's show that everyday citizens believe in bold, America First leaders more than gun-grabbing, far-left socialists - == | == | | | == | | | == | Kat has prioritized getting seats on the committees where she can best fight for you. That's why she now proudly serves on the Agriculture Committee and the Homeland Security Committee, where she is the ranking member on the subcommittee on Emergency Preparedness, Response, and Recovery. But Kat is also working hard to secure blessings of liberty in other ways, like holding "Woke" Big Tech oligarchs accountable for their intrusions on the First Amendment, putting the Chinese Communist Party on notice, and fighting for border security. Her voting record also shows that she won't back down - Kat has rejected far-left proposals to Defund the Police, undermine the integrity of elections, and infringe upon our gun rights! Kat is willing to do whatever it takes to ensure your interests are pursued and your values are safeguarded. The first FEC deadline is rapidly approaching, and Kat needs your help to reach this goal. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | For Florida, Team Kat | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

The way things stand right now we 're going to miss our deadline by $7,530. If we miss this goal, we are setting ourselves up for failure, and all but guaranteeing that the radical left maintains their corrupt control. == == == I'm running for Governor to bring back real leadership to Virginia; to make sure that our schools are open five days a week, every week, with teachers in every classroom, to make sure that our small businesses are protected, and that our Constitutional rights and freedoms are protected. But we can't win without you. For the next 24 hours we are unlocking 4X-MATCHING to help us close the gap. == MAKE IT A 4X-MATCH DONATION | == | == ---|--- == | == We cannot, I repeat CANNOT, miss this critical deadline. With Biden in the White House and the Democrats in control in the House and Senate, winning these special elections is an absolute MUST. _Pelosi 's majority is hanging on by a thread._ If we want to put America First and end Pelosi's socialist agenda, victory is non-negotiable.

**[Your support could be the difference we need to maintain President Trump and House conservatives' legacy!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OBdwX8AHZjkON8pr0f22neb-uo6NeYNUhYGYlVaBskqc7ImVvWUNgC8n9vvOYgr3VmRMpRmjRWznu_mWIzv_kzK0nZz_cc8KMBsC70mmt_PgUCZp4HQEs9kl8AFRQUPo9vEAIPLaQ4kIKvIHgnEtSipfJ-Fe-ZxhTrB2nXmeuH5PnXQAimwoDljqYfqiTRL0Rl3T1B5fwALVExSK1DD8q71eD1jt3X778ayhcNnj5VuSgBXf-oXKetpcCiiHUZTRBKjVirz2Y-5BCCi6yjoZI064I-MPOPaSDxaILYIA9MuHM6Lx9T6U1CQVB21Dx5GJT7g-ctmGttoKneUJVtu8W8SG6q8hjyveOXLSvYNnqyhvcfTVpuoT0cWAaxkTsGX7nNgJnNHmVbJFK0MZnYCeOxOcsQOyWx3pjEZgCAAbhnvTwqM46ImJdw_tSSKJApaiR0m9lX7W0v2oxlB2B-_UIcu1m_YCoCGoYeevDxGpmJc=&c=oftJgY1ChmX5v1PYX7d0nwbJOTiwTK2-8hlowzB3QkRe8Li5cl0cjw==&ch=Wc2wuYhWVpPDm0DTGWzWYkLUG5J7ayF_6BRqYNnNhtJkhGcWDMhsTA==)**

body:
The filibuster is one of the only things keeping Chuck and Nancy in check from passing far-left, radical legislation. Getting rid of it would ensure they are able to enact whatever liberal wish list they want, without any sort of accountability.
Friend,

So much for UNITY happening. Recently, Chuck Schumer went on record and said that working with Republican Senators under Obama was a big mistake. Now, he wants to try to get rid of the filibuster.

**[**STOP CHUCK AND NANCY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ls7Uo8trQKdf8R6BJFUkR3zLtvoRwDebchD5X_rycIAGkzNlJwPsdxti7IVALAiqOSCghxtZ7bBnUeg_pZag6U-w2x7s6fN0daKOxVZ1vgq6LCWvimEKTKEo4KMFnAvJZbbP0rvEHqKK2HH5tk0QBmn-520y7_DHTS-_xAUOcPcsnbClNBGhGM1gSG91UbblCfx55vC7cZoN2crGraDTKxBoBLlluny_-zlculaRYqpWoQevayzNm3ynkw5NajdagcErvN5rdCDEjnCV-8yvKOlmAlSH88DpF0JzsPhfYcQY3L8MdjXyulJPMKrsRVwpd1YQOsyJpqKjv6vrB8MrJzc7jYAjdRuoLtRm3wwdlsfzm-ynE_KRzaVRGNTtHzEFNBkeDf2Ncjv3F80ezgJmUA==&c=TqWqK_q5ZVqIiL8Lc1W2GHhT4WpHjZKTylRKxN0JClcWt6oRhwq5ug==&ch=Ze30D6hgOR66AhhOiirOxLneiQijvGn4Za2UenfqPgCMHY88oY92KA==)**

name: Critical Border Alert (via McMorris Rodgers HQ)
subject: A conservative majority in the House will secure our border...unlike what is happening right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorris Rodgers Win The Future Fund
body:
have you heard about the crises going on at the Southern border of our great country?

Friend, have you heard about the crises going on at the Southern border of our great country? Illegal immigrants are arriving in large groups and crossing the border in numbers that we have not seen IN YEARS.

Border agents are releasing these groups of people after only a short period of time in holding because of the Biden administration's policies on the matter.

U.S. Customs and Border Protection has stated that this massive increase in the number of detainees across the border is a DIRECT RESULT of President Biden's rhetoric and extreme policies.

[**[Restore a Conservative Majority]**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JuNLy9dDJRo5_5on3-yg6ERPPmhyLPNuwedaVb9mOaGBl-WGoweCSbytgviEPMQqV0IHBqYP8uEBW8Fc9Xl5h7fRI2EFTfwcZIHsQ2jaAYSvAeTrSkunCJCME32onrmzHtNdl2SLZr83xWDT5109Us4k1uoFw4rBEFSVzaZaDxzVHUG0M6B54qmu5NR5SYBveExX_AyRfDY1MDnF-JERT67wYDqTZxvY8f5c4zhqGXfujfBU7P6oJuKBYnhi8CUSDNbkRTIVHHAt3P1bCdW1tjBMzacs3lWFqmSsa7ya5cWn4D6l4IB-Hl5z23fa6Ei07k4C9PASc-vF84gDCnFbDwe_NRnurWYHv2RHesVRMPAyOjqgZ473uGYPKkipfyN02Om_cDkE4XxgweuqKslSQwEQvB3xA2g2Kn0s_N86IGDYr1hxJTfj3R7gyxJjB8Al7qa575vrewgGVZkOs50ha0Gy0CQgyFGb0YZ430HNrHRsPJZFShmTGopXn-so6YQMrlmzZmxgtWXYPETdFEWJXfHa-XG74DSZFriFgJ6AcHrlTKOeAEf5QIWaNsVJNP56vEBazNTVMsggBLiSFStAhqt8c2m2bfD0dJvdRfSDJ9M=&c=_mMZsdFjd8mt5A-r9VyjxDyijh0VFPqPtBVgGzCIWx76xdvXisNwnA==&ch=VcmVPt3lZoRgbgZnf4HgA-hfoJ-9DoYqkkNCAu1iqbyuBXmeA0C_1g==)

_**The left has learned nothing from their previous careless immigration failures: **_
* Their endless attempts to stop advancements to border security over the past 4 years

* How angry they were at ICE and border patrol agents for trying to keep us safe.

* Remember how so many on the Democratic Presidential stage embraced open borders.

**Those statements have not changed under the current Democratic leadership have they...**

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues CDC for Communications with Big Tech on COVID-19
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) seeking records of communications between the Centers for Disease Control (CDC) and Big Tech about COVID-19.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 15, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22334&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcGVsb3NpLXBlbnRhZ29uLWNoaWVmLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTUxOTQ5MzU=) | **[Judicial Watch Sues for Records of Pelosi Call with Pentagon Chief](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22334&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcGVsb3NpLXBlbnRhZ29uLWNoaWVmLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTUxOTQ5MzU=)** Pelosi acknowledged the call in a January 8 letter to her Democratic colleagues. In the letter, Pelosi purportedly related her discussion with Milley earlier that same day: “This morning, I spoke to the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Mark Milley to discuss available precautions for preventing an unstable president from initiating military hostilities or accessing the launch codes and ordering a nuclear strike. The situation of this unhinged President could not be more dangerous, and we must do everything that we can to protect the American people from his unbalanced assault on our country and our democracy.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22334&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcGVsb3NpLXBlbnRhZ29uLWNoaWVmLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTUxOTQ5MzU=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22333&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2RjLWNvbW11bmljYXRpb25zLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTUxOTQ5MzU=) | **[Judicial Watch Sues CDC for Communications with Big Tech on COVID-19](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22333&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2RjLWNvbW11bmljYXRpb25zLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTUxOTQ5MzU=)** “The public has the right to know about CDC’s involvement in Big Tech’s outrageous censorship of Americans, including doctors, who raise questions about the COVID-19 response,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Biden administration should stop stonewalling and release the records about the CDC’s role in suppressing the free speech of Americans.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22333&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2RjLWNvbW11bmljYXRpb25zLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMTUxOTQ5MzU=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22332&F=H&) | **[After 18 Years, Billion-Dollar Bioterror Defense System Still Can’t Detect Multiple Threats](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22332&F=H&)** In the latest of many issues to plague the nation’s seriously flawed system to detect biological attacks, a federal audit reveals it lacks detection equipment in more than half the country and is unable to recognize multiple biological agents that pose threats. The beleaguered system, known as BioWatch, has already received north of a billion dollars in government funding and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) keeps pouring money into it despite its well-documented failures. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22332&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22344&F=H&) | **[Number of Illegal Immigrants Arrested by ICE Dropped More than 60% in February](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22344&F=H&)** Predictably, the Biden administration’s disastrous immigration policies are having a detrimental impact on the U.S. even though they have only been in place for weeks. In that short time, the nation has seen an overwhelming flood of illegal alien minors slam Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and a huge drop in adult fugitives arrested by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22344&F=H&)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [Clear Thinking on Elections from Clarence Thomas ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53163&L=22348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9jbGVhci10aGlua2luZy1vbi1lbGVjdGlvbnMtZnJvbS1jbGFyZW5jZS10aG9tYXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMxNTE5NDkzNQ==) Judicial Watch The Supreme Court shut the door on the 2020 election late last month, but Justice Clarence Thomas got the last word. In a dissent directed at the court’s decision not to take up two cases involving the Pennsylvania Supreme Court and mail-in ballots, Thomas encapsulated the world of electoral woe surrounding the 2020 presidential contest. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Never Again
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **We just passed the One Year mark of Governor Walz' Unilateral Declaration of Emergency Powers. Since March 13th of last year, Walz has abused his powers and destroyed businesses, infringed on civil liberties and has interfered in our lives at unprecedented levels. For those reasons, our team has one thing to say to him:**
## **NEVER AGAIN!**
Today, Rep Erik Mortensen introduced the [**Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_introducing_the_unilateral_emergency_powers_repeal_act?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again&n=2) on the House floor. And Rep Jeremy Munson has already signed on as a co-author! Unlike all the fake bills offered by weak Republicans and Con Artist Democrats like Julie Sandstede, this legislation does exactly what is needed to RESTORE OUR REPUBLIC! Here's what the Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act does:
## **1\. Removes the Governor's Ability to Unilaterally Declare an Emergency**
The most concerning thing to us in the last year is that one man was able to unilaterally declare an emergency, create his own orders, extend those powers, and the only way to make them end, is to get members of his own party to vote to remove them. This is the most anti-democratic thing I've ever seen. And it's also illegal, according to our Constitution. Our legislation removes the ability of the Governor to unilaterally declare Emergency Powers, instead requiring a 2/3 majority in both the House and Senate to declare one - not one person!
## **2\. The Governors orders will not be treated as law**
The purpose of executive orders is for a Governor to direct government agencies and workers, not to order citizens to do or not do something. Unfortunately, Walz has treated executive orders as a power similar to that of a king. He's used them to force us to wear masks, stay in our homes, shut down places of worship, close businesses and a long list of other violations of our civil rights. Courts have upheld Walz' ability to do this by how poorly written the Chapter 12 Emergency Powers law is written. So the Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act eliminates the portion that treats the Governor's order as law! Which means, you don't have to follow Walz' orders and the courts can't make you!
## 3\. Punishes the Governor with Jail Time for Violations
Chapter 12 law right now states that violators can be punished by $1,000 fine or 90 days in jail. So Governor Walz took that part of the law and applied it to violators of his orders. In other words, if you went over to your friend's home last November against his order, you could've been put in jail for 90 days. This bill reverses the punishment. Now if the Governor or a government agent violates the law, then they will be punished by a $1,000 fine or 90 days in jail; not YOU. This would put Walz behind bars if he did this again!
## 4\. Establishes a Citizens' Bill of Rights for Emergencies
Last, but certainly not least, the **Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act** not only takes away the ability of the Governor to unilaterally declare an emergency, issue orders with the weight of law, and punish people with jail time, it also ensures that people's rights are protected by a Bill of Rights, including, but not limited to: \- the right of free speech; \- the right to exercise religious beliefs; \- the right to assemble; \- the right to keep and bear arms; \- the freedom of travel; and \- the right to operate a business or earn income
## Want to See This Pass? Here's How to Help
I think it goes without saying, that Governor Walz is not likely to sign the **Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act**. After all, what tyrant would give up his own powers? So the objective of this legislation is to build such a massive block of support in the Legislature to override the Governor's veto OR to settle the score in the 2022 election. Can you imagine a more important issue to present to the voters than this?! We are prepared and ready to run the NEVER AGAIN campaign if it comes to it. But I'd like to think optimistically. We've now hired a whole team of doorknockers and field operators and have the flexibility to move them to targeted districts across the state to put pressure on more legislators. So we're going to start taking this message to voters immediately! **Here's the lit we just delivered to our team for the week. Thank you for[supporting our field operations](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again&n=3).** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again&n=4) **I need your help.** Please contact your state representative and tell him or her to sign onto HF 2204, the Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act, as a co-author. We MUST ENSURE that we have at least 15 authors on this bill so we can get a roll call vote on it when we bring it up for a vote.
# [WHO REPRESENTS ME](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again&n=5)
You are likely to be met with resistance, as shocking as that might sound. Our intel at the Capitol is that House Minority Leader Kurt Daudt has instructed members to not sign on to bills that Rep Erik Mortensen authors. I know what you're thinking - how petty can this guy be? **But remember, Daudt isn't their boss. You are, as the constituent. Most of these Republican representatives are in agreement with us on this important issue. Don't let them follow Daudt's orders. Tell them to stand up for principles and sign onto[HF 2204](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_introducing_the_unilateral_emergency_powers_repeal_act?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again&n=6) today! We have to make sure this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN!** One other request...please email me and let me know what your representative tells you. It's absolutely critical that we get at least 15 co-authors on board. Otherwise, the Republican and Democrat establishment won't allow us to get a roll call vote. **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again&n=8).

Unlike all the fake bills offered by weak Republicans and Con Artist Democrats like Julie Sandstede, this legislation does exactly what is needed to RESTORE OUR REPUBLIC! Here's what the Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act does: 1\. Removes the Governor's Ability to Unilaterally Declare an Emergency The most concerning thing to us in the last year is that one man was able to unilaterally declare an emergency, create his own orders, extend those powers, and the only way to make them end, is to get members of his own party to vote to remove them. This is the most anti-democratic thing I've ever seen. And it's also illegal, according to our Constitution. Our legislation removes the ability of the Governor to unilaterally declare Emergency Powers, instead requiring a 2/3 majority in both the House and Senate to declare one - not one person! 2\. The Governors orders will not be treated as law The purpose of executive orders is for a Governor to direct government agencies and workers, not to order citizens to do or not do something. Unfortunately, Walz has treated executive orders as a power similar to that of a king. He's used them to force us to wear masks, stay in our homes, shut down places of worship, close businesses and a long list of other violations of our civil rights. Courts have upheld Walz' ability to do this by how poorly written the Chapter 12 Emergency Powers law is written. So the Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act eliminates the portion that treats the Governor's order as law! Which means, you don't have to follow Walz' orders and the courts can't make you! 3\. Punishes the Governor with Jail Time for Violations Chapter 12 law right now states that violators can be punished by $1,000 fine or 90 days in jail. So Governor Walz took that part of the law and applied it to violators of his orders. In other words, if you went over to your friend's home last November against his order, you could've been put in jail for 90 days. This bill reverses the punishment. Now if the Governor or a government agent violates the law, then they will be punished by a $1,000 fine or 90 days in jail; not YOU. This would put Walz behind bars if he did this again! 4\. Establishes a Citizens' Bill of Rights for Emergencies Last, but certainly not least, the Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act not only takes away the ability of the Governor to unilaterally declare an emergency, issue orders with the weight of law, and punish people with jail time, it also ensures that people's rights are protected by a Bill of Rights, including, but not limited to: \- the right of free speech; \- the right to exercise religious beliefs; \- the right to assemble; \- the right to keep and bear arms; \- the freedom of travel; and \- the right to operate a business or earn income Want to See This Pass? Here's How to Help I think it goes without saying, that Governor Walz is not likely to sign the Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act. After all, what tyrant would give up his own powers? So the objective of this legislation is to build such a massive block of support in the Legislature to override the Governor's veto OR to settle the score in the 2022 election. Can you imagine a more important issue to present to the voters than this?! We are prepared and ready to run the NEVER AGAIN campaign if it comes to it. But I'd like to think optimistically. We've now hired a whole team of doorknockers and field operators and have the flexibility to move them to targeted districts across the state to put pressure on more legislators. So we're going to start taking this message to voters immediately! Here's the lit we just delivered to our team for the week. Thank you for. I need your help. Please contact your state representative and tell him or her to sign onto HF 2204, the Unilateral Emergency Powers Repeal Act, as a co-author. We MUST ENSURE that we have at least 15 authors on this bill so we can get a roll call vote on it when we bring it up for a vote. You are likely to be met with resistance, as shocking as that might sound. Our intel at the Capitol is that House Minority Leader Kurt Daudt has instructed members to not sign on to bills that Rep Erik Mortensen authors. I know what you're thinking - how petty can this guy be? But remember, Daudt isn't their boss. You are, as the constituent. Most of these Republican representatives are in agreement with us on this important issue. Don't let them follow Daudt's orders. Tell them to stand up for principles and sign onto today! We have to make sure this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN! One other request...please email me and let me know what your representative tells you. It's absolutely critical that we get at least 15 co-authors on board. Otherwise, the Republican and Democrat establishment won't allow us to get a roll call vote. In Liberty, Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Team AOC
subject: Something BIG is coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We have a big milestone in just a couple weeks, and we could use your help!
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210315-1945-header&t=1&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP)
In just two weeks we have a huge milestone for the campaign. It’ll be the very first official quarterly fundraising deadline of the election cycle.
That means we’ll submit a public report to the FEC about how much we’ve raised so far this year. This report gets scrutinized heavily, so it’s important for us to be able to post strong numbers.
**Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted Democrats in Congress.** Right-wing outlets like Fox News spend countless hours trying to stoke outrage about her policy agenda. And last cycle, Republicans spent more than $10 million trying to kick her out of Congress.
There’s a lot coming up – from big legislative pushes around infrastructure to a redistricting fight that will change the boundaries of New York’s congressional districts. That’s why we’re writing today asking for your support before the FEC report is due.
[Can you make a $3 contribution right now to help us get on track to reach our fundraising goal for Team AOC before the end-of-quarter deadline?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8155?refcode=em20210315-1945&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8155?refcode=em20210315-1945&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP)**
Alexandria doesn’t raise money the old-school way at fancy parties with wealthy donors or from corporate PACs that write checks in exchange for legislative tradeoffs. She relies 100% on grassroots fundraising to keep up her fight in Congress. Our average donation is just about $17.
**More than 1-in-3 of our campaign dollars come from generous supporters giving over emails like this one.** It’s a critical funding source for us. That’s why we’re writing today ahead of this big end-of-quarter FEC deadline.
[Please, if you can afford it, make a $3 contribution to help Team AOC reach our goals now before our deadline.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8155?refcode=em20210315-1945&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP)
\- Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210315-1945-footer&t=24&refcode2=1945_2526796_t27WGP&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=1945%2E2526796%2Et27WGP). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com
